articles.title: STAT+: 5 years after lupus breakthrough, CAR-T is still surprising autoimmunity researchers
articles.summary: CAR-T therapy is toting up more remissions in autoimmune disease, and generating a flood of experimentation and investment.
articles.chinese_summary: CAR-T疗法在自身免疫疾病领域取得突破性进展，系统性红斑狼疮治疗后五年持续呈现缓解效果。该疗法引发大量实验研究与投资热潮，为自身免疫疾病治疗开辟全新方向，持续超出研究人员预期。

articles.title: One woman, three autoimmune diseases: CAR-T therapy vanquishes ultra-rare disease trio
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01108-4Fourteen months after treatment with engineered immune cells, the recipient has no symptoms and doesn’t need to take medication.
articles.chinese_summary: 《自然》杂志报道一名患有三种自身免疫疾病的女性在接受CAR-T细胞治疗后，14个月内症状完全消失且无需服药。该案例展示了CAR-T疗法在自身免疫疾病领域的突破性应用，为传统疗法无效的患者提供了新的治疗希望。

articles.title: RAStoERK: a reference interaction atlas for insights into signaling and disease
articles.summary: The RAS/RAF/MEK/ERK pathway has been extensively studied for its roles in physiology and disease, yet a systems level view of its interplay with the broader cellular context is lacking, limiting insight into paralog specific roles, mutation driven rewiring, and cross pathway integration. To address this, we simultaneously mapped the interactomes of all pathway components and their activating and inactivating mutations, identifying 2,500 high confidence interactors, 88% of which previously unrepo
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究构建了RAS/ERK信号通路的全面相互作用图谱，揭示了2500个高置信度相互作用因子。该图谱为理解信号转导机制、突变导致的网络重构及疾病发生提供了系统视角，对癌症靶向治疗和精准医疗具有重要价值。

articles.title: STAT+: A new health care blueprint from a key Democratic think tank
articles.summary: Democrats are focused on health care affordability as costs keep climbing.
articles.chinese_summary: 民主党智库发布医疗改革蓝图，重点关注医疗成本持续上涨背景下的可负担性问题。文章涉及医疗政策制定和公共健康管理，与大健康领域直接相关，但未涉及创新药或生物制造技术。

articles.title: Labguru Customer Portal Launched for CRO/CDMO and Client Collaboration
articles.summary:
The new portal was designed to extend internal workflows to support external collaborators. With this structured approach, labs experience increased efficiency while minimizing version conflicts, human error, and compliance risks.
The post Labguru Customer Portal Launched for CRO/CDMO and Client Collaboration appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: Labguru推出面向CRO/CDMO与客户协作的门户平台，通过结构化工作流程提升实验室效率，减少版本冲突、人为错误和合规风险，主要服务于生物制造领域的合作管理。

articles.title: Seer to Apply Deep Proteomics Tech to Singapore Population Cohort Study
articles.summary:
Under the terms of the partnership, Seer's Proteograph product suite will be used to profile the plasma proteome in samples from 10,000 participants from the PRECISE-SG100k initiative.
The post Seer to Apply Deep Proteomics Tech to Singapore Population Cohort Study appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: Seer公司将利用深度蛋白质组学技术分析新加坡PRECISE-SG100k项目中1万名参与者的血浆蛋白质组。该研究通过大规模人群队列的蛋白质组分析，有助于发现疾病生物标志物，推动精准医疗和公共卫生发展。

articles.title: LINC00205	 acts as a multivalent scaffold promoting FUSP525L recruitment in Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis stress granules
articles.summary: Stress granules (SG) are dynamic, membrane-less ribonucleoprotein assemblies that orchestrate cellular stress responses and rapidly disassemble upon stress relief. In Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS), mutations in RNA-binding proteins such as Fused in Sarcoma (FUS) impair SG dynamics, promoting the formation of aberrant and persistent granules. Although long non-coding RNAs (lncRNAs) are emerging as regulators of ribonucleoprotein organization, their mechanistic role in SG architecture and pa
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示长链非编码RNA LINC00205在肌萎缩侧索硬化症中通过招募突变FUS蛋白促进应激颗粒异常形成的分子机制。该发现为理解神经退行性疾病病理提供了新视角，对开发针对RNA-蛋白质相互作用的创新疗法具有重要价值，特别是在基因治疗和精准医疗领域。

articles.title: Esophagus engineering tackles function
articles.summary: Nature Biotechnology, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41587-026-03100-9A tissue-engineered esophageal graft supports luminal patency in growing minipigs with emerging structural integration.
articles.chinese_summary: 该研究在《自然生物技术》报道了一种组织工程食管移植物，能在生长中的小型猪体内保持管腔通畅并实现结构整合。这项技术属于生物制造领域的组织工程应用，通过工程化方法构建功能性器官，对再生医学和器官替代治疗具有重要价值。

articles.title: Almost half of traded wildlife carry disease-causing pathogens
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01121-7More than 40% of traded mammal species share at least one pathogen with humans, compared with only 6% of non-traded mammals.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究表明超过40%的贸易哺乳动物携带至少一种人类病原体，远高于非贸易物种的6%。这凸显野生动物贸易对公共卫生的潜在威胁，可能加剧人畜共患病的传播风险，与大健康领域的疾病预防和公共安全密切相关。

articles.title: Female mice grow testes after this single DNA tweak
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01120-8Small changes in the non-coding part of the genome have a key role in sex determination.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现通过单次DNA调整可使雌性小鼠长出睾丸，揭示非编码基因组在性别决定中的关键作用。该发现对基因治疗领域具有潜在意义，为性别相关发育障碍的治疗提供新思路。

articles.title: Your nose contains multitudes — of long-lived immune cells
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01111-9Nasal tissue harbours T cells that ‘remember’ a pathogen long after infection is past.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现鼻腔组织含有能够长期‘记忆’病原体的T细胞，这些细胞在感染结束后仍能持续存在。这一发现对理解呼吸道免疫记忆、疫苗开发和预防策略具有重要意义，属于大健康领域的免疫学研究。

articles.title: STAT+: Which U.S. metros have the highest health spending? The answer might surprise you
articles.summary: There's not a consistent theme among the 10 highest and lowest spending metros, which highlights the “irrationality” of U.S. health care spending, experts say.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章分析美国不同都市区的医疗支出差异，揭示医疗资源分配不均和支出不合理性。这反映了大健康领域的公共卫生资源配置问题，对精准医疗和健康政策制定具有参考价值，但未涉及创新药或生物制造技术。

articles.title: Opinion: The Pasteur Institute of Iran illustrates important truths about global public health
articles.summary: “War may command attention, but welfare is built in laboratories,” write Charentan Chatterjee and Guy Vernet.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章通过伊朗巴斯德研究所案例，强调实验室研究对公共卫生建设的重要性。虽然未直接讨论创新药或生物制造技术，但阐述了基础医学研究机构在全球健康体系中的核心作用，为精准医疗和公共卫生政策提供重要启示。

articles.title: STAT+: Biotech VCs, used to a winning formula in drug development, face disruption
articles.summary: For decades, venture capitalists have relied on a tried-and-true recipe to make money in biotech. Now that approach is being disrupted.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章探讨生物技术风险投资传统模式的颠覆，与创新药领域高度相关。VC长期依赖的药物开发盈利模式面临挑战，反映了CAR-T、基因治疗等新兴疗法对投资格局的冲击，以及生物医药创新生态的演变。

articles.title: STAT+: FDA rejects an industry proposal to deregulate some AI devices
articles.summary: In this edition of Health Tech: FDA rejects a proposal to deregulate certain types of AI devices, pharma invests $50 million in DTx, and more.
articles.chinese_summary: FDA拒绝放宽部分AI医疗设备监管的行业提案，同时制药公司向数字疗法投资5000万美元。文章聚焦医疗AI监管政策与数字健康投资，主要涉及医疗器械审批和数字疗法发展，与大健康领域的监管政策和健康科技创新相关。

articles.title: DNA Uptake in Cholera May Increase Defense Mechanisms
articles.summary:
Study showed that Cholera bacteria can efficiently acquire genetic elements from extracellular DNA released by other cholerae strains and non-cholera vibrio species, potentially adding to their own antiviral defense arsenals. 
The post DNA Uptake in Cholera May Increase Defense Mechanisms appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究显示霍乱弧菌能有效摄取其他霍乱菌株和非霍乱弧菌释放的胞外DNA，可能增强其抗病毒防御机制。这一发现对理解细菌基因转移、开发新型基因治疗工具及应对细菌耐药性具有潜在意义，属于创新生物医药研究范畴。

articles.title: Do the twist: bacteria can spin ‘pucks’ without touching them
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01112-83D-printed discs harness a previously overlooked feature of bacterial locomotion to power tiny motors.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现细菌能通过旋转运动驱动3D打印圆盘，无需直接接触。这一发现揭示了细菌运动的新特征，有望应用于微纳尺度生物制造，开发新型生物驱动系统或微流体设备，为合成生物学和生物加工提供创新工具。

articles.title: STAT+: Top health officials highlight efforts to make medical records more portable
articles.summary: Health tech companies are working to make medical records more portable, but so far, the effort is voluntary.
articles.chinese_summary: 卫生技术公司正致力于提高医疗记录的可移植性，使患者数据能在不同系统间顺畅流转。目前这些努力仍属自愿性质，但有望推动精准医疗发展，改善公共卫生数据共享。

articles.title: C-section rate in 2025 highest in a decade
articles.summary: Why people overeat, how public health survives in war, and more health news from Morning Rounds
articles.chinese_summary: 文章报道2025年剖腹产率达到十年新高，同时涉及暴食原因、战时公共卫生等健康新闻。内容聚焦公共卫生政策和健康趋势，与创新药和生物制造领域无直接关联，属于大健康范畴的公共卫生报道。

articles.title: STAT+: Genetics may shape GLP-1 outcomes, slightly
articles.summary: The traditional biotech venture model under pressure, PhRMA chief Ubl to exit, and other biotech news from The Readout
articles.chinese_summary: 文章探讨遗传因素可能影响GLP-1药物疗效，与大健康领域的精准医疗相关。同时提及生物技术风险投资模式压力及行业动态，但未深入创新药研发或生物制造技术细节。

articles.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about top pharma lobbyist stepping down, genes and GLP-1 drugs, and more
articles.summary: Steve Ubl, chief executive of PhRMA, plans to step down at the end of the ‌year, after more than a decade leading the main trade group for brand-name drug makers
articles.chinese_summary: 美国药品研发与制造商协会(PhRMA)首席执行官Steve Ubl宣布将于年底卸任，结束其领导品牌药企主要游说团体十多年的任期。该人事变动涉及医药行业政策游说层面，与大健康领域的产业政策存在间接关联。

articles.title: A new trick for old science, and  biotech VCs’ scrambled playbook
articles.summary: This week on "The Readout LOUD": Why is old exon science getting new traction? What’s unsettling biotech VCs? And who will be the next CEO of PhRMA?
articles.chinese_summary: 本期播客讨论三个话题：为何旧外显子研究重获关注、生物科技风投面临的挑战、以及PhRMA下一任CEO人选。内容聚焦行业动态与投资策略，与具体药物研发或生物制造技术关联较弱，主要涉及生物科技领域的商业环境分析。

articles.title: New rules for CDC vaccine panel aim to address lawsuit, empower Kennedy’s allies
articles.summary: The panel had become a flashpoint as RFK Jr.'s health department worked to limit the number of recommended childhood shots.
articles.chinese_summary: 美国CDC疫苗咨询委员会因肯尼迪团队推动限制儿童疫苗接种数量而成为争议焦点。新规旨在回应相关诉讼并增强其盟友影响力，主要涉及公共卫生政策层面，与疫苗推荐指南相关，但与创新药研发或生物制造技术直接关联有限。

articles.title: Prion Protein Deficiency Results in Synaptic, Neural Network and Behavioral Alterations
articles.summary: The cellular form of the prion protein (PrPC) is known for its involvement in the pathogenesis of prion diseases. Recent research implicates the physiological isoform of PrP in neuronal development, excitability, and synaptic plasticity, as well as in other biological processes. However, its precise function in the development and function of neurons remains poorly understood. Here, we investigated its role during different developmental stages, both in vitro and in vivo, using different PrP kno
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究探讨朊蛋白缺失对神经元发育和功能的影响，发现其会导致突触、神经网络及行为改变。该基础研究主要揭示朊蛋白在神经发育中的生理功能，与疾病病理机制相关，但与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域的直接关联有限。

articles.title: Opinion: Tastiness is not why people overeat
articles.summary: “We can’t afford another sweeping restructuring of the food supply based on imprecise interventions and uncertain science,” writes David L. Ludwig.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章质疑以口味解释过度进食的传统观点，呼吁避免基于不精确干预和不确定科学对食品供应进行大规模重组。主要涉及公共健康营养政策领域，与创新药和生物制造的直接关联度较低。

articles.title: Opinion: As a palliative care physician, I’m nervous about the Medicare infusion of $100 million for ‘functional or lifestyle medicine’
articles.summary: MAHA ELEVATE could open a federal funding pipeline to interventions that can't survive contact with a plausibility filter.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨了美国医疗保险向功能医学投入1亿美元资金的政策争议。作者作为姑息治疗医生，质疑功能医学缺乏科学依据，担忧公共医疗资源被用于未经证实的干预措施。文章主要涉及医疗政策与资金分配，与大健康领域的公共健康议题相关。

articles.title: STAT+: Trump promised to clamp down on health insurers. His policies are enriching them
articles.summary: In December, Trump said he would summon health insurance execs to the White House. It doesn't seem a meeting ever happened.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文讨论特朗普政府针对健康保险公司的政策承诺与实际执行情况，指出其政策反而使保险公司获益。主要涉及医疗保险政策领域，与创新药和生物制造直接相关性较低，属于大健康范畴下的公共政策议题。

articles.title: A trans-piRNA network and transcriptional antagonism shape piRNA cluster function
articles.summary: PIWI-interacting (pi)RNAs protect animal germlines from transposable elements (TEs) by guiding their sequence-specific repression. In Drosophila germline, piRNAs are encoded in distinct genomic regions, piRNA clusters (piCs), that are transcribed by a non-canonical machinery that is anchored on chromatin by the HP1 paralogue Rhino. Studies of transgenic piCs revealed that piRNA biogenesis depends on cytoplasmic inheritance of piRNAs, however, whether native piCs require trans-generational piRNA
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示果蝇生殖细胞中piRNA簇通过跨代piRNA网络和转录拮抗机制调控转座子沉默的分子机制。虽然属于基础生物学突破，但与创新药开发、生物制造及大健康产业无直接关联，主要推动表观遗传学和生殖生物学领域发展。

articles.title: Disentangling mitochondrial copy number variation and PCR amplification bias in DNA metabarcoding
articles.summary: DNA metabarcoding is a central tool in biodiversity research and monitoring, producing detailed taxa lists with comparatively little time and effort. One of its limitations, however, is the lack of quantitative data on biomass or abundance. This limitation has two main reasons: 1) template copy number variation and 2) primer-induced amplification bias. Many metabarcoding markers are mitochondrial and mitochondrial copy numbers vary in animal tissues, potentially decoupling sequence counts from b
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究探讨DNA元条形码技术中线粒体拷贝数变异和PCR扩增偏倚对物种定量分析的影响。虽然涉及分子生物学技术，但主要聚焦生态监测方法学优化，与生物医药核心领域关联度较低。

articles.title: Should academic misconduct be catalogued? Proposed US database sparks debate
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01147-xRepository would require US universities to register research fraud and workplace harassment.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文讨论美国建立学术不端行为数据库的提议，要求大学登记研究欺诈和职场骚扰。该议题主要涉及科研诚信体系建设，与生物医药领域的技术创新、生产制造或健康管理无直接关联，仅间接涉及科研环境治理。

articles.title: How to thrive in science when you move abroad
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00550-8Sonali Majumdar offers a toolkit to support international scientists, their supervisors and mentors.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文为《自然》杂志发表的职业指南，聚焦国际科研人员的职业发展挑战，提供面向科学家、导师和主管的支持工具包。内容主要涉及学术生涯规划与跨文化适应，与生物医药领域的直接技术关联较弱。

articles.title: Liquid or solid? Oobleck droplets are both
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01109-3High-speed cameras can observe the strange behaviour of a cornstarch–water mixture.
articles.chinese_summary: 该研究通过高速摄像机观察玉米淀粉-水混合物的奇异行为，发现这种欧不裂液滴同时表现出液态和固态特性。虽然揭示了非牛顿流体的独特物理性质，但与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域的直接关联性较弱，主要属于基础物理学研究范畴。

articles.title: I was with Artemis II’s scientists during the Moon fly-by. Here’s what I saw
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01138-yNature correspondent Alexandra Witze describes the joy and tension at mission control in Houston.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文为《自然》杂志记者对Artemis II月球飞越任务期间任务控制中心科学团队工作状态的现场报道，主要描述航天任务执行过程中的团队协作与情绪体验。内容聚焦航天工程而非生物医药领域，与创新药、生物制造及大健康主题无直接关联。

articles.title: Electric vehicles can ride to the grid’s rescue
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01110-wVehicle-to-grid technology, if installed properly, could allow vehicles to serve as back-up batteries.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨车辆到电网技术如何使电动汽车作为备用电池支持电网，属于能源技术领域。与生物医药的创新药、生物制造及大健康领域无直接关联。

articles.title: BBB Access Route via Proteomic Vascular Mapping
articles.summary:
Understanding the processes of molecular movement across the BBB has been somewhat elusive, but a new technique for identifying the proteins within the luminal surface has been developed by HHMI researchers.
The post BBB Access Route via Proteomic Vascular Mapping appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.

articles.title: Ambiphilic cross-coupling with aryl-bismuth reagents
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10486-8Ambiphilic cross-coupling with aryl-bismuth reagents

articles.title: Single-Cell Atlas of Maternal–Fetal Interface Sheds Light on Pregnancy Complications
articles.summary:
Scientists mapped the human maternal–fetal interface in unprecedented detail, identifying new cell types and mechanisms underlying pregnancy complications like preeclampsia, miscarriage, and preterm birth, improving understanding of healthy and disrupted development.
The post Single-Cell Atlas of Maternal–Fetal Interface Sheds Light on Pregnancy Complications appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.

articles.title: A luciferase-based assay for assessing IRES-mediated translation in Wheat Germ Extract
articles.summary: Efficient protein synthesis in eukaryotic cells typically requires a 5' cap structure on messenger RNAs (mRNAs). However, under stress conditions or in viral infection, translation can also occur independently of the cap via internal ribosomal entry sites (IRES). IRES elements are therefore key regulators of protein expression in both viral and cellular contexts. Here we describe a cell-free protocol to quantitatively assess IRES-mediated translation using wheat germ extract (WGE) and a firefly
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了一种基于萤火虫荧光素酶的检测方法，利用小麦胚芽提取物无细胞系统定量评估内部核糖体进入位点（IRES）介导的翻译机制。该技术主要应用于基础生物学研究，与病毒翻译和细胞应激反应相关，但与创新药、生物制造或大健康领域的直接关联有限。

articles.title: Opinion: How sports betting is hooking some young men
articles.summary: Not everyone who uses sports betting apps will get in trouble — but with so many people taking part, even a small percentage represents a big problem.

articles.title: STAT+: A decade ago, these drugs tore apart the FDA. Today, they might be some patients’ best hope

articles.summary: Accurate detection of RNA splice variants is often hindered when transcripts lack large distinguishable exonic regions, making conventional PCR strategies challenging. articles.summary: Diffuse midline gliomas (DMGs) are a deadly class of pediatric high-grade brain cancers. This dominant-negative mutation replaces lysine 27 with methionine (K27M) and prevents global K27 di- and tri-methylation of all wild-type histone H3 proteins. articles.summary: Proper polyadenylation site (PAS) selection is critical for RNA isoform determination. Here, we establish that the splicing factor SRSF1 regulates PAS selection independently of and through interactions with U1 snRNP. articles.summary: At the endoplasmic reticulum (ER), membrane protein quality control is tightly regulated to ensure excess subunits are recognized and degraded to protect cellular homeostasis. Using genome wide CRISPR screens, we identified a factor of unknown function, thioredoxin domain containing protein 15 (TXNDC15), and showed that it regulates membrane protein stability by tuning the activity of the E3-ubiquitin ligase, MARCHF6. The Mcm10 protein is essential for helicase activation in budding yeast, but an equivalent role for MCM10 orthologues in animal cells has not been explored. articles.title: Disrupting miR-466l-3p and HuR Cooperation with Target Site Blockers Reveals a Therapeutic Strategy to Destabilize mRNA Transcripts
articles.summary: MicroRNAs (miRNAs) typically regulate gene expression by promoting mRNA degradation, but select miRNAs, such as miR-466l-3p (miR-466), can instead stabilize transcripts in coordination with RNA-binding proteins (RBPs) like HuR. We identify conserved AU-rich elements (cAREs) within the 3'-UTRs of IL-17A, GM-CSF, and IL-23A as critical cis-regulatory binding site where miR-466 facilitates HuR recruitment to promote mRNA stability. Using site-directed mutagenesis, RNA pulldown, and MS2-TRAP assays

articles.title: MicroRNAs are required within a critical time window to define neural patterning during early human brain development
articles.summary: MicroRNAs (miRNAs) are key post-transcriptional regulators of cell state transitions, yet their function in early human brain development is largely unknown. Here, we present a longitudinal analysis of miRNA function in developing human forebrain organoids. We show that mRNAs and miRNAs expression mirrors known developmental gene programs and that miRNA biogenesis peaks at neural commitment. To test the function of miRNAs in regulating commitment, we impaired their biogenesis at defined stages.

Furthermore, we show here that AS also produces nuclear long non-coding RNAs (lncRNAs) from protein-coding genes, which can serve regulatory functions rather than expanding proteomic complexity. articles.summary: Phase variation is viewed as a simple stochastic ON/OFF switch helping bacteria survive unpredictable environments. In minimal-genome pathogens like Mycoplasma bovis, simple sequence repeats (SSRs) introduce frameshifting InDels in key phase-variable genes, such as the Type III restriction-modification mod genes, typically assumed to result in binary expression. articles.summary: Hypoxia is a defining feature of the solid tumour microenvironment and a major determinant of therapeutic response. Hypoxia-inducible factors (HIFs) are central regulators of transcriptional reprogramming under hypoxic stress. Hypoxia can paradoxically elicit both tumour-promoting and tumour-suppressive outcomes, suggesting regulatory mechanisms beyond canonical HIF-dependent pathways. articles.title: Dual Control of LDL-cholesterol Levels by ANGPTL3 and ANGPTL8
articles.summary: BACKGROUND: Inactivation of ANGPTL3 (angiopoietin-like protein 3, A3) is a proven therapeutic strategy for lowering plasma lipid levels independently of the LDL receptor (LDLR), yet the optimal approach to inactivate A3 remains unclear. A3 is proteolytically cleaved and circulates as full-length (A3-FL), N-terminal (A3-Nter) and C-terminal (A3-Cter) fragments. The specific contribution of each form of A3, and of its paralog, ANGPTL8 (A8), in modulating circulating levels of ApoB-Containing Lipop

articles.title: Temperature-sensitive cytoplasmic incompatibility across divergent Wolbachia partly reflects cifB transcription, not endosymbiont density
articles.summary: Maternally transmitted Wolbachia bacteria are common in insects, with many strains altering host reproduction through cytoplasmic incompatibility (CI). CI kills embryos fertilized by Wolbachia-bearing males unless those embryos also carry Wolbachia, which favors females with Wolbachia and drives the endosymbiont to higher frequencies in host populations. Strong CI now underpins successful applications that rely on maintaining pathogen-blocking Wolbachia transinfections in vector populations to r

articles.title: Scalable homology detection with ERAST

articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 01 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10299-9N-desethyl-fluornitrazene is a µ-opioid receptor agonist derived from nitazenes that has supramaximal intrinsic efficacy that produces analgesia with minimal adverse effects in rodent models.

articles.title: Dopaminergic mechanisms of dynamical social specialization

articles.title: Gene regulatory landscape dissected by single-cell four-omics sequencing

articles.title: The 1000 Chinese Pangenome empowers medical and population genetics

articles.title: Entanglement and electronic coherence in attosecond molecular photoionization

Although the molecular details of ferroptosis regulation have been widely explored, the contributions of short non-coding RNAs (ncRNAs) to ferroptosis regulation, other than miRNAs remain poorly understood. articles.summary: Nature Biotechnology, Published online: 31 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41587-026-03083-7Single-molecule 4Pi microscopy is simplified and made accessible by using a single objective.

articles.title: Common Ancestry Limits Protein Sequence Exploration, Computational Study Shows
articles.summary:
Protein evolution remains tightly constrained by ancestral starting points. By comparing real protein families with simulated evolution, researchers reveal why natural diversity occupies only a narrow region of sequence space.
The post Common Ancestry Limits Protein Sequence Exploration, Computational Study Shows appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 计算研究表明，蛋白质进化受共同祖先严格限制。通过对比真实蛋白家族与模拟进化，发现自然多样性仅占据狭窄的序列空间，揭示了进化约束的分子机制。

articles.title: Opinion: STAT+: Washington is on the verge of true PBM reform
articles.summary: Like it or not, PBMs are fiduciaries.

articles.title: STAT+: Health care jobs growth is stagnating at the biggest for-profit firms

articles.chinese_summary: 大型营利性医疗保险公司正在缩减岗位，医疗补助计划削减可能迫使医院裁员，显示医疗保健行业就业增长陷入停滞。

articles.title: Opinion: Remembering public health pioneer Barry Bloom: a scientist, a mentor, a mensch

articles.chinese_summary: 白宫已起草药品定价政策立法文本，并与十余家大型制药公司共享。这一举措旨在推动降低药价，可能对医药行业监管和市场产生深远影响。

articles.title: Raw dairy co. refutes connection to E. coli outbreak

articles.title: STAT+: The omnipresent power of health care jobs
articles.summary: The American workforce has grown in large part thanks to the health care industry, but one key sector is cutting back.
articles.chinese_summary: 美国劳动力增长主要依赖医疗健康产业扩张，但关键部门正在缩减规模。该现象凸显医疗就业对经济的重要影响及结构性变化。

articles.title: Lead still raises risk of heart disease, years after exposure, study warns
articles.summary: A JAMA study details how lead lingers in the body and how it can elevate blood pressure, harm blood vessel lining, and raise risk of heart attack.
articles.chinese_summary: 《JAMA》研究揭示铅暴露后持续危害心血管机制：铅长期滞留体内会升高血压、损伤血管内皮，显著增加心脏病发作风险。

articles.title: STAT+: Early signs of Alzheimer’s often go undetected. These researchers want to change that
articles.summary: Using AI to analyze changes in brain scans can predict Alzheimer’s with nearly 93 percent accuracy, scientists say.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究人员利用AI分析脑部扫描变化，可提前预测阿尔茨海默病，准确率近93%。该技术有望实现早期筛查，改变传统诊断滞后局面。

articles.title: STAT+: Why this Stanford psychiatrist thinks diet can influence serious mental health disorders
articles.summary: Shebani Sethi is at the vanguard of metabolic psychiatry, a field that investigates the link between diet and serious mental health disorders.
articles.chinese_summary: 斯坦福精神病学家Shebani Sethi开创代谢精神病学研究，探索饮食与严重心理健康障碍的关联。该新兴领域为精神疾病治疗提供了新的干预视角。

articles.title: STAT+: Doctors Without Borders calls Gilead ‘unconscionable’ for refusing to sell HIV prevention drug to organization
articles.summary: The move came after months of talks in which Doctors Without Borders asked Gilead Sciences for a “limited” supply of lenacapavir.

articles.title: STAT+: Pharma giant Takeda to lay off nearly 250 workers in latest job cutting
articles.summary: Takeda Pharmaceuticals, the largest biopharma employer in Mass., will lay off 250 workers in Cambridge beginning in July.
articles.chinese_summary: 武田制药宣布将于7月起在剑桥裁员约250人，这是该马萨诸塞州最大生物制药企业最新的人员精简举措。

articles.title: Wave Plummets 50% on Obesity Data
articles.summary:
Investors zeroed in on the mere 0.9% dip in body weight and 3.3% decline in waist circumference (both placebo-adjusted) reported in the 32-participant 240 mg dose cohort following a six-month follow-up review during the Phase I INLIGHT trial (NCT06842186), designed to assess WVE-007 in healthy individuals living with overweight or obesity conditions. 
The post Wave Plummets 50% on Obesity Data appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: WVE-007在INLIGHT一期临床试验中表现不佳，240mg剂量组随访6个月后，体重和腰围仅分别下降0.9%和3.3%（扣除安慰剂效应），导致投资者信心受挫。

articles.title: African Trypanosomes Use a Molecular Shredder to Avoid Detection in the Bloodstream
articles.summary:
African trypanosomes evade immunity by switching surface proteins and using ESB2, an RNA “shredder,” to control gene expression via RNA decay, revealing new vulnerabilities and potential treatments for sleeping sickness.
The post African Trypanosomes Use a Molecular Shredder to Avoid Detection in the Bloodstream appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 非洲锥虫通过切换表面蛋白并利用ESB2 RNA“分子粉碎机”调控基因表达，从而逃避宿主免疫。这一发现揭示了新的治疗靶点，为昏睡病治疗提供新思路。

articles.title: Lilly Grows AI Footprint with Up-to-$2.75B Insilico Collaboration
articles.summary:
Lilly has agreed to pay Insilico $115 million upfront, as well as development, regulatory, and commercial milestones. Insilico will grant the pharma giant an exclusive global license to develop, manufacture, and commercialize “potentially best-in-class, novel oral therapeutics."
The post Lilly Grows AI Footprint with Up-to-$2.75B Insilico Collaboration appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 礼来与英矽智能达成高达27.5亿美元的合作，支付1.15亿美元首付款。英矽智能授予其新型口服疗法的全球独家许可，旨在开发潜在同类最佳的创新药物。

articles.title: Why Data Infrastructure Determines AI Success in Drug Discovery
articles.summary:
The goal is to make good data practices the path of least resistance. Perhaps the most important requirement is software that experimental scientists can use naturally within their existing workflows.
The post Why Data Infrastructure Determines AI Success in Drug Discovery appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章强调数据基础设施是AI药物发现成功的关键。核心在于构建易于实验科学家使用的软件系统，使其能在现有工作流程中自然应用良好数据实践。

articles.title: Link Between Ceramide Transport and Cell Senescence Could Inform Aging Biology Research
articles.summary:
An in vitro study showed how impaired transport protein and buildup of ceramides at the endoplasmic reticulum can help lock cells into replicative senescence, potentially pointing to avenues for research on cell aging. 
The post Link Between Ceramide Transport and Cell Senescence Could Inform Aging Biology Research appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 体外研究表明，神经酰胺转运蛋白功能障碍导致其在内质网积聚，从而促使细胞进入复制性衰老。这一发现为细胞衰老机制研究提供了新方向。

articles.title: Autism Risk Genes Largely Shared Across Global Populations
articles.summary:
A large autism genomics study in Latin American populations identifies shared risk genes across ancestries, supporting universal genetic architecture, improving diagnostic equity, and highlighting the importance of diverse representation in genetic research.
The post Autism Risk Genes Largely Shared Across Global Populations appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 针对拉丁美洲人群的大型自闭症基因组研究发现，不同族裔间自闭症风险基因高度共享，证实了普适的遗传结构。这有助于提升诊断公平性，并凸显了基因研究中多样化人群的重要性。

articles.title: SELECTIVE TRANSCRIPTOMIC VULNERABILITY OF MEMBRANE-INTEGRATED ARCHITECTURES DURING NEURAL TISSUE VITRIFICATION
articles.summary: Cryopreservation is essential for long-term storage of biological tissues. Yet, surprisingly, the precise molecular impact of cryopreservation on tissue transcriptomes remains poorly defined. This study provides the first resource of whole-genome transcriptomic changes following cryopreservation. This study used bulk RNA sequencing to examine how preservation method (snap freezing or vitrification) affects transcriptomes in mouse cerebral cortex and hippocampus. This allowed us to separate cryop
articles.chinese_summary: 研究首次系统揭示了神经组织玻璃化冷冻对转录组的影响，发现膜整合结构相关基因特别易受损伤，为优化低温保存技术提供了分子层面的重要依据。

articles.title: Meiotic cohesin paralogs govern cell survival by exhibiting flexibility in partner choice
articles.summary: Erroneous loading of the ring-shaped cohesin complex, especially at centromeres, cause chromosomal segregation defects in both mitosis and meiosis. Mitotic cohesin subunits of this complex, either get replaced or co-exist with their meiotic paralogs during meiosis and also in certain cancers. However, it is unclear whether meiotic paralogs can partner mitotic subunits to form hybrid complexes in somatic cells and if there are any functional consequences on cancer progression. Here, we provide a
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现减数分裂黏连蛋白旁系同源物在染色体分离中具有灵活性，能够通过改变结合伙伴来维持细胞存活，这对理解染色体异常和癌症发生具有重要意义。

articles.title: A lysyl oxidase (LOX)/bone morphogenetic protein-1 (BMP1) complex to facilitate collagen remodeling
articles.summary: Collagen biosynthesis within the extracellular matrix (ECM) relies on finely regulated enzymatic steps to ensure proper collagen maturation and fibrillar assembly. Among these, bone morphogenetic protein 1 (BMP1) and the canonical lysyl oxidase (LOX) act on the collagen telopeptide to promote procollagen processing and oxidative cross-linking, respectively. However, the mechanisms that ensure precise coordination of their activities remain poorly understood. Using NanoBiT assays, we identified a
articles.chinese_summary: 研究揭示了LOX/BMP1复合物在胶原蛋白成熟过程中的关键作用，该复合物通过协同作用于胶原端肽，促进前胶原交联和细胞外基质的纤维组装。

articles.title: A uniquely leptin sensitive hypothalamic neuron population limits hyperphagia and weight gain in diet-induced obesity
articles.summary: Despite widespread loss of leptin responsiveness in obesity, endogenous leptin continues to restrain feeding, yet the neural substrates that remain sensitive and mediate this effect are unknown. Combining spatial transcriptomics with single-nucleus RNA sequencing in mice with diet-induced obesity (DIO), we show that while most hypothalamic leptin receptor (Lepr) neurons minimally respond to elevated leptin, a single population defined by glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor (Glp1r) co-expression ret
articles.chinese_summary: 该研究通过空间转录组学发现，在饮食诱导肥胖小鼠中，下丘脑特定神经元群体仍保持瘦素敏感性，能够抑制过度摄食和体重增加，为肥胖治疗提供了新靶点。

articles.title: Tau-induced elevation in promoter-proximal RNA polymerase II pausing is linked to decreased expression of long neuronal genes in a Drosophila tauopathy model.
articles.summary: Tauopathies, including Alzheimers disease, are age-related neurodegenerative disorders characterized by abnormal phosphorylation and buildup of microtubule-associated protein tau. Gene expression dysregulation is a key molecular feature of tauopathies, but how aging and disease interact to disrupt crucial transcriptional regulators and pathways remains largely unknown. Here, we examined how pathological tau affects gene expression programs in age-related neurodegenerative disease using a well-es
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现在果蝇tau蛋白病模型中，Tau蛋白异常会增强RNA聚合酶II在启动子近端的暂停，导致长神经元基因表达下调，揭示了转录调控异常在神经退行性疾病中的新机制。

articles.title: Critical roles of MCM8 in meiotic recombination during mouse spermatogenesis
articles.summary: Meiotic DNA double-strand break (DSB) formation and repair by homologous recombination is crucial for ensuring proper chromosome segregation. In mice, the mini-chromosome maintenance family protein, MCM8, has been proposed to function in meiotic recombination and its loss leads to infertility, but the underlying mechanisms are poorly understood. Here we used cytological and genomic assays to infer the role of MCM8 during meiotic recombination in mouse spermatocytes. We show that MCM8-deficient s
articles.chinese_summary: 研究证实MCM8蛋白在小鼠精子发生过程中调控减数分裂DNA双链断裂修复，其缺失导致重组缺陷与不育，阐明了该蛋白在生殖遗传中的核心功能。

articles.title: PIWI proximity proteome reveals Set1-mediated piRNA biogenesis for transposon silencing in telomere
articles.summary: Silencing complexes formed by PIWI-clade Argonaute (Ago) proteins and PIWI-interacting RNAs (piRNAs) are essential guardians of genome integrity, controlling the deleterious activities of transposable elements (TEs) in animal germline. However, our understanding of PIWI-piRNA-directed TE silencing remains incomplete. Here, we systemically characterize the proximity proteome of PIWI members, Piwi, Aubergine (Aub), and Ago3 in the germline of Drosophila ovaries. Functional screening identifies pre
articles.chinese_summary: 利用PIWI邻近蛋白质组学技术，揭示Set1介导的piRNA生成机制在端粒区转座子沉默中的关键作用，深化了对基因组稳定性守护机制的理解。

articles.title: Engineering macrophage-targeted trispecific immune cell engagers for tumor immunotherapy
articles.summary: Nature Biotechnology, Published online: 30 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41587-026-03104-5Immune cell engagers (ICEs) have emerged as a promising strategy for cancer immunotherapy, but their efficacy in solid tumors remains limited, partly as a result of the difficulty of coordinating activating and inhibitory signals within the same immune cell. Here, we report a logic-gated cis-targeting strategy that enables ICEs to coordinate activating and inhibitory signals within macrophages, thereby enhancing
articles.chinese_summary: 开发了靶向巨噬细胞的三特异性免疫细胞衔接器，通过协调激活与抑制信号克服实体瘤治疗障碍，为肿瘤免疫治疗提供了新型高效工具。

articles.title: Massively parallel promoter mapping identifies edits to boost sorghum gene expression
articles.summary: Nature Biotechnology, Published online: 30 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41587-026-03060-0Non-transgenic crop improvement via cis-regulatory editing is limited by rare activating alleles and incomplete promoter maps. A massively parallel reporter assay in sorghum protoplasts quantifies more than 30,000 CRISPR-mimicking variants across three photosynthesis genes, finely mapping cis-regulatory modules and pinpointing compact edits that drive upregulated protein production.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究通过高通量平行报告系统分析高粱原生质体中3万多个顺式调控元件，构建了完整启动子图谱，识别出可增强基因表达的非转基因编辑靶点，为作物改良提供了新策略。

articles.title: Dawkins’s paradox: dissecting the body’s battle to keep selfish genes in check
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 30 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00970-6An essay series by specialists in evolutionary biology, philosophy and more examines the ‘paradox of the organism’.
articles.chinese_summary: 进化生物学等多领域专家探讨“机体悖论”，解析生物体如何抑制自私基因的机制，揭示生命进化的内在矛盾。

articles.title: Quantum simulations verified by experiments for the first time

articles.title: Now is the time for scientific societies to guide global research

articles.title: Anthony Leggett obituary: physicist who brought quantum theory to the macro world
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 30 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01010-zThe polymath also trained as a philosopher and won a Nobel prize for his theory of superfluids.
articles.chinese_summary: 纪念物理学家Anthony Leggett，他因超流体理论获诺贝尔奖，将量子理论引入宏观世界研究，兼具哲学家背景的跨学科思维。

articles.title: Countdown to Artemis: is NASA’s Moon mission the dawn of a new space age?

articles.title: Inside the ‘self-driving’ lab revolution

articles.title: How buildings and cities can be aligned with life
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 30 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00971-5Following nature’s patterns, not fighting them, is the way forward for the built environment.
articles.chinese_summary: 提出建筑与城市规划应遵循自然模式而非对抗，通过仿生设计实现与生命系统的协调，为可持续发展提供新范式。

articles.title: Why I made a river my co-author
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 30 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00973-3Anne Poelina gives first authorship to a source with deep knowledge about water — the river itself.
articles.chinese_summary: 作者将河流列为论文第一作者，创新性地赋予自然实体学术署名权，体现了对传统知识体系的尊重与跨物种合作的理念。

articles.title: Static electricity is a mystery but invisible carbon may be key
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 30 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01012-xA thin layer of carbon on the surface of oxide grains changes how they exchange static charge.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现氧化物颗粒表面的薄层碳改变了静电交换方式，揭示了碳在静电现象中的关键作用，为理解静电机制提供了新视角。

articles.title: STAT+: AI drug developer Insilico Medicine and Lilly ink commercialization deal worth up to $2.75 billion
articles.summary: Lilly has signed a deal with AI drug developer Insilico that’s worth $115 million up front and approximately $2.75 billion in biobucks
articles.chinese_summary: 礼来与AI制药公司Insilico达成商业化协议，首付款1.15亿美元，潜在总额高达27.5亿美元，凸显AI药物开发的商业价值。

articles.title: Whole-genome pre-amplification as a viable approach for genomic screening of FFPE-derived DNA samples
articles.summary: Whole-genome sequencing (WGS) enables comprehensive analysis of tumour genomes, but its use in formalin-fixed paraffin-embedded (FFPE) samples is limited by DNA fragmentation and low yields. Whole-genome amplification (WGA) methods such as multiple displacement amplification (MDA) can boost DNA availability but distort copy-number alteration (CNA) profiles. DNA ligation-mediated MDA (DLMDA) mitigates this bias by reconstituting fragmented templates, yet its performance in FFPE-derived DNA remain
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究提出全基因组预扩增（WGA）方法，可有效提升福尔马林固定石蜡包埋（FFPE）样本中低质量DNA的产量，克服全基因组测序应用瓶颈，为临床肿瘤基因组筛查提供可行方案。

articles.title: KDM2B controls HIF levels and activity through its JmjC and CxxC domains
articles.summary: Hypoxia-inducible factors (HIFs) are key regulators of cellular responses to low oxygen (hypoxia), controlling the expression of genes required for survival and adaptation. KDM2B, a chromatin-modifying enzyme, is a direct target of HIF-1, but its precise role in regulating HIF and the hypoxia response remains unclear. Here, we investigated the role of KDM2B in the response to hypoxia in a variety of cell lines. Our analysis reveals that KDM2B depletion regulates HIF activity in a cell type depen
articles.chinese_summary: 阐明KDM2B通过其JmjC和CxxC结构域双向调控HIF蛋白水平与活性。该染色质修饰酶在缺氧应答中形成关键反馈回路，影响细胞适应机制。

articles.title: Chromatin remodelling enables enhancer resetting to facilitate the ERK transcriptional response
articles.summary: During development, cellular identity is ultimately determined by transcriptional output: lineage-specific genes must be activated, while genes associated with alternative fates must be repressed. This process depends on the activity of chromatin remodelling complexes, which regulate the accessibility of transcription factors to chromatin regulatory elements. In addition, cellular identity is shaped by exposure to intercellular signals. Understanding the mechanisms by which extracellular signals
articles.chinese_summary: 揭示染色质重塑复合物通过重置增强子状态调控ERK信号通路转录响应。该机制在发育过程中协调细胞特异性基因表达与命运决定。

articles.title: Rapidly evolving aphid gall effector proteins exhibit saposin-like folds
articles.summary: Many insects manipulate plants by injecting effector proteins. In one extreme example of this molecular hijacking, Hormaphis cornu aphids inject bicycle proteins into Hamamelis virginiana (Witch Hazel), contributing to the development of novel organs called galls. Bicycle proteins share no amino acid sequence similarity with proteins of known function. Here, we report the crystal structures of two divergent bicycle proteins. Both proteins contain saposin-like folds: one with multiple disulfide b
articles.chinese_summary: 发现蚜虫分泌的Bicycle效应蛋白通过Saposin-like结构域诱导植物形成虫瘿。这类快速进化蛋白虽无序列同源性，但通过共同结构域实现宿主操纵。

articles.title: Barcode Crosstalk in ONT Multiplex Sequencing: Quantification and Mitigation Strategies
articles.summary: Multiplexing samples in long-read sequencing with Oxford Nanopore Next Generation Sequencing Technology (ONT) by ligating specific native barcodes to individual DNA samples enables significant increases of high throughput sequencing combined with a significant reduction of sequencing costs. However, this advantage carries the risk of barcode misassignment/crosstalk. Employing ONT multiplex sequencing with samples, we observed misassigned barcodes so called barcode crosstalk, after ONT library pr
articles.chinese_summary: 研究量化了牛津纳米孔多重测序中的条码串扰问题，并提出了有效缓解策略。通过优化实验流程，可在降低测序成本的同时保障高通量数据的准确性。

articles.title: Cytosolic and ER-associated ribosomes share rRNA 2'-O-methylation landscapes across human cell types
articles.summary: Ribosome heterogeneity arising from variable rRNA 2'O methylation (2'O Me) has been proposed as a potential mechanism for translational specialization, but whether such heterogeneity contributes to compartment specific translation remains unknown. Here, we systematically compare the 2'O Me landscapes of cytosolic and endoplasmic reticulum (ER)-associated ribosomes across three human cell types: HEK293 cells, H9-derived neural progenitor cells (NPCs), and neurons differentiated from these NPCs. U
articles.chinese_summary: 系统比较发现人细胞中胞质和内质网相关核糖体的rRNA 2'-O甲基化谱高度一致，表明核糖体异质性可能不是区室特异性翻译的主要调控机制，对理解翻译调控具有重要意义。

articles.title: Expansion and optimization of the auxin-inducible degron 2 (AID2) system in Candida pathogens
articles.summary: The auxin-inducible degron (AID) technology is a convenient and powerful tool for protein functional characterization in a broad array of eukaryotic species. We recently demonstrated that the original AID and improved AID2 systems are very effective at rapid protein depletion in Candida albicans and described a limited set of reagents for their use in certain auxotrophic lab strains. With an eye towards broader applicability with improved flexibility, we report here a new series of template vect
articles.chinese_summary: 成功将改良型生长素诱导降解系统（AID2）扩展应用于念珠菌病原体，实现了快速高效的蛋白功能研究，为真菌遗传学工具开发提供了重要技术支撑。

articles.title: Label-free toehold mediated strand displacement on 3D printed hybrid paper-polymer platform for protein sensing
articles.summary: A programmable 4-input cascade DNA logic gate utilizing toehold mediated strand displacement (TMSD) was implemented on a 3D printed hybrid paper-polymer vertical flow device (3D HPVF) for on/off sensitive and specific fluorescence detection of platelet derived growth factor BB (PDGF BB). Polypropylene was 3D printed directly on paper and thermally cured to create micro paper analytical devices (uPADs). The 3D HPVF comprised of three layers of uPADs enclosed in a casing that clamped each uPAD sec
articles.chinese_summary: 开发基于3D打印纸-聚合物混合平台的免标记链置换DNA逻辑门系统，实现了血小板衍生生长因子BB的高灵敏特异性荧光检测，为便携式蛋白传感提供了创新技术路径。

articles.title: Alternative polyadenylation drives isoform-dependent m6A remodeling during Zika virus infection
articles.summary: Viral infection can reprogram host gene expression by selectively remodeling the cellular epitranscriptome. N6-methyladenosine (m6A) is a reversible RNA modification that is dynamically altered during infection by Flaviviridae viruses, including Zika virus (ZIKV), yet the mechanisms underlying transcript-specific m6A changes remain poorly understood. Here, we integrated glyoxal and nitrite-mediated deamination of unmethylated adenosine sequencing (GLORI-seq) and METTL3 RNA immunoprecipitation an
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现寨卡病毒感染通过选择性多聚腺苷酸化驱动异构体依赖性m6A表观转录组重塑，揭示了病毒调控宿主基因表达的新机制，为理解黄病毒科病毒致病机制提供新视角。

articles.title: STAT+: Amid focus on food, FDA leader briefs lawmakers on priorities
articles.summary: Infant formula safety, updating labels, defining ultraprocessed foods, and expanding inspections of processing plants are among the priorities.
articles.chinese_summary: FDA向国会通报工作重点，包括婴儿配方奶粉安全、标签更新、超加工食品定义及扩大食品加工厂检查范围等关键领域。

articles.title: Agentic AI, Virtual Cell, LNP Vaccine Boosters, Engineered Organs, and Mergers
articles.summary:
In this episode of GEN's Touching Base, editors discuss agentic AI regulation, a new virtual cell model, LNP improvement of vaccine delivery, engineered organs segments, and corporate mergers.
The post Agentic AI, Virtual Cell, LNP Vaccine Boosters, Engineered Organs, and Mergers appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 本期节目涵盖五大热点：代理AI监管、虚拟细胞模型、LNP疫苗递送优化、器官工程进展及企业并购，展现生物技术前沿动态。

articles.title: Gut-Immune Link Identified in Multiple Sclerosis-Related Neuroinflammation
articles.summary:
Researchers studying patients with MS and a mouse model of the disease identify the role of gut-derived cells in antigen presentation as a key initiator of autoimmune neuroinflammation.
The post Gut-Immune Link Identified in Multiple Sclerosis-Related Neuroinflammation appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究通过MS患者及小鼠模型发现，肠道来源细胞的抗原呈递作用是自身免疫性神经炎症的关键起始因素，揭示肠-免疫轴在MS中的新机制。

articles.title: Bioengineered Implants Deliver Multi-Drug Therapy in Animal Models
articles.summary:
By generating its own oxygen supply, a new implantable device keeps drug-producing cells alive and functional for weeks, supporting sustained therapeutic delivery for treating chronic conditions.
The post Bioengineered Implants Deliver Multi-Drug Therapy in Animal Models appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 新型生物工程植入装置通过自主供氧维持产药细胞活性，在动物模型中实现长达数周的持续多药治疗，为慢性病管理提供新方案。

articles.title: lncOriL, a novel polyadenylated mitochondrial lncRNA common to zebrafish and human
articles.summary: Even though teleost fish and mammals share the same mitochondrial gene content and organization, the teleost mitochondrial transcriptome is still poorly understood. We characterized the mitochondrial transcriptome during zebrafish (Danio rerio) early development by long-read direct RNA sequencing. All heavy-strand specific mRNAs were found to carry 3 poly-A tails of approximately 50-60 residues, and the transcriptome profile was distinctive but practically invariant between stages. Three unusual
articles.chinese_summary: 首次在斑马鱼早期发育中发现新型多聚腺苷酸化线粒体长链非编码RNA lncOriL。该RNA在人类中保守存在，拓展了对脊椎动物线粒体转录组复杂性的认知。

articles.title: The tumour suppressor RBM5 activates the helicase DHX15 to regulate splicing
articles.summary: Pre-mRNA splicing determines the expressed proteome and is frequently dysregulated in cancer. The tumour-suppressor RBM5 controls an exon network regulating apoptosis, yet its molecular mechanism is elusive. Using in vivo spliceosome capture and cryogenic electron microscopy, we determined structures of precatalytic spliceosomes arrested by RBM5 immediately after U2 snRNP branchpoint recognition. Despite intron diversity, the U2-pre-mRNA duplex, branchpoint adenine, and downstream polypyrimidine
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现肿瘤抑制因子RBM5通过激活解旋酶DHX15调控前体mRNA剪接。利用冷冻电镜技术解析了其分子机制，揭示了RBM5在癌症中调控凋亡相关外显子网络的新途径。

articles.title: mRNA stability in response to m6A placement is linked to cell identity in planarians
articles.summary: N6-methyladenosine (m6A) is a widespread internal modification of eukaryotic mRNA that influences transcript fate, including mRNA stability and cell-type-specific gene expression. However, the mechanisms underlying m6A-mediated regulation remain poorly understood in many systems, including the highly regenerative planarian Schmidtea mediterranea. To address this, we generated a high-confidence atlas of ~72,200 m6A sites across the planarian transcriptome using multiplexed direct RNA sequencing.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究揭示m6A修饰对mRNA稳定性的调控在涡虫中具有细胞类型特异性。该发现阐明了m6A通过影响转录本命运来调控细胞身份的新机制，为理解表观转录组学功能提供了重要见解。

articles.title: Genome-wide analysis of Heavy metal ATPase (P1B-type ATPase) gene family in Mung bean  and their expression analysis under heavy metal (Zn, Cd and Cu) stress
articles.summary: Heavy metal ATPases (HMAs) are important group of transmembrane proteins involved in homeostasis of metal ions in plant systems. In this study, a comprehensive analysis of genome assembly (VC1973A v7.1) resulted in the identification of nine HMA genes (VrHMA) and their corresponding proteins in Mungbean, an agronomically important legume crop known for its nutritional values. VrHMA proteins were also characterized based on their biomolecular features, conserved domains and motifs arrangement, tr
articles.chinese_summary: 在绿豆基因组中鉴定出9个重金属ATP酶基因，并分析其在锌、镉、铜胁迫下的表达模式。揭示VrHMA家族在植物金属离子稳态中的重要作用。

articles.title: DNA–drug conjugates enable logic-gated drug delivery amplified by hybridization chain reactions
articles.summary: Nature Biotechnology, Published online: 27 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41587-026-03044-0New capabilities for controlling drug delivery into cells are developed using DNA–drug conjugates.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了DNA-药物偶联物，结合逻辑门控技术与杂交链式反应，实现了对细胞内药物递送的精准调控，显著提升了靶向治疗的可控性与效率。

articles.title: High-resolution metagenome assembly for modern long reads with myloasm
articles.summary: Nature Biotechnology, Published online: 27 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41587-026-03053-zA long-read metagenome assembly method recovers circular and complete genomes better than existing tools.
articles.chinese_summary: 提出新型长读长宏基因组组装方法myloasm，相比现有工具能更高效地恢复环状完整基因组，显著提升微生物群落基因解析精度。

articles.title: Mapping cis-regulatory mutations at scale in sorghum enables modulation of gene expression
articles.summary: Nature Biotechnology, Published online: 27 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41587-026-03046-yVariant mapping of sorghum promoters identifies CRISPR-accessible mutations that upregulate gene expression.
articles.chinese_summary: 通过大规模绘制高粱启动子突变图谱，鉴定出CRISPR可编辑的顺式调控突变位点，实现了对基因表达的有效调控，为精准育种奠定基础。

articles.title: Unpaired data as a first-order challenge in single-cell and spatial proteomics
articles.summary: Nature Biotechnology, Published online: 27 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41587-026-03074-8Unpaired data as a first-order challenge in single-cell and spatial proteomics
articles.chinese_summary: 研究指出单细胞与空间蛋白质组学中数据不成对问题是一级挑战，强调需开发新方法解决数据整合难题以提升分析准确性。

articles.title: Eye drops made from pig semen deliver cancer treatment to mice
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 27 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00982-2Minuscule particles with the ability to cross hard-to-penetrate barriers can be loaded with drug treatments to target intractable diseases.
articles.chinese_summary: 创新利用猪精液衍生纳米颗粒制备眼药水，成功搭载抗癌药物穿透生物屏障，小鼠实验证明其对难治性疾病的靶向治疗潜力。

articles.title: Motherhood derails women’s academic careers — these data reveal how and why
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 27 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00981-3Mothers in academia take on considerably more childcare-related responsibilities than do fathers.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究揭示学术圈母亲承担远超父亲的育儿责任，量化数据阐明母职如何系统性阻碍女性科研人员的职业发展。

articles.title: Briefing Chat: ‘Zombie cells’ resurrected with new genes
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 27 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00996-wNature staff discuss some of the week's top science news.
articles.chinese_summary: 《自然》团队解析本周科研要闻，重点报道通过基因重组技术成功复活衰老'僵尸细胞'，为细胞再生研究提供新路径。

articles.title: Sunken Soviet nuclear submarine’s radioactive release
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 27 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00953-7Low levels of radioactive strontium and caesium are emanating from a pipe on the wreck of the Komsomolets.
articles.chinese_summary: 监测发现苏联沉没核潜艇Komsomolets通过管道持续释放低剂量放射性锶和铯，揭示了深海核遗存对环境的潜在风险。

articles.chinese_summary: 文章为书评专栏，由Andrew Robinson精选并评述五本优质科普读物，涵盖深海生物与宇宙探索等前沿科学领域。

articles.title: Huge lung-cancer screening campaign boosts early diagnosis

articles.chinese_summary: 大规模肺癌筛查项目为55-74岁吸烟者提供扫描，显著提升早期肺癌检出率，通过早诊改善癌症防治效果。

articles.title: Why labs need a napping room to help you work, rest and play
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 26 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00549-1A 30-minute snooze can boost creativity and help banish burnout, says neuroscientist Joseph Jebelli, author of The Brain at Rest.
articles.chinese_summary: 神经科学家提出实验室应设置小憩空间，30分钟午睡能显著提升创造力并缓解职业倦怠。该建议基于大脑休息状态对认知功能影响的研究。

articles.title: Trump’s new science advisers include 12 technology chiefs — and one academic
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 26 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00977-zSparse academic presence on the US President’s Council of Advisors on Science and Technology reflects a focus on technology and industry.
articles.chinese_summary: 特朗普新一届科学顾问委员会仅含1名学者，其余12人均为科技企业高管。该组成反映美国科技政策重心向产业界倾斜的明显转变。

articles.title: Chats with sycophantic AI make you less kind to others
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 26 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00979-xEven people who were sceptical of chatbots’ utility fell under the sway of the AI tools’ flattery.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现与谄媚型AI交流会导致用户对他人更不友善。即使最初对聊天机器人持怀疑态度者，也会受其奉承影响改变行为模式。

articles.title: Daily briefing: Earliest known dog genome pushes genetic record back 5,000 years
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 26 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00992-0The 15,000-year-old remains of domestic dogs hint at their importance to early communities with different ways of living. Plus, ‘grade inflation’ hits PhDs and how environmental scientists can reinvent their research when funding is scarce.
articles.chinese_summary: 距今1.5万年的家犬基因组将记录前推5000年，揭示早期不同生活方式社群中犬类的重要地位。这一发现为犬类驯化史提供了关键遗传学证据。

articles.title: History of ‘forever’ chemicals is written in Antarctic snow
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 26 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00867-4Data gathered during a 1,200-kilometre polar trek show where PFAS levels are the highest.
articles.chinese_summary: 南极雪层记录显示，PFAS（永久化学品）污染在特定区域浓度最高。这项基于1200公里极地考察的研究，为追踪全球污染物分布提供了关键环境证据。

articles.title: Functional integration of an autologous engineered esophagus in a large-animal model
articles.summary: Nature Biotechnology, Published online: 20 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41587-026-03043-1A tissue-engineered esophageal segment is functional in minipigs.
articles.chinese_summary: 通过在小型猪模型中成功植入自体组织工程食管段，证实其功能性整合，为食管缺损的临床修复提供了可靠的再生医学解决方案。

articles.title: Generalist biological artificial intelligence in modeling the language of life
articles.summary: Nature Biotechnology, Published online: 20 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41587-026-03064-wThis Review discusses the promises and pitfalls of biological AI algorithms and presents a vision for generalist biological artificial intelligence, in which models can perform diverse tasks across biological domains.
articles.chinese_summary: 综述探讨了生物通用人工智能的前景与挑战，提出能够跨生物学领域执行多样化任务的通用模型框架，旨在统一生命语言的计算解析。

articles.title: Advancements and expanding applications of CAR-T cell therapy.
articles.summary: CAR T-cell therapy has become a transformative modality in oncology, demonstrating sustained clinical efficacy in hematologic malignancies. Recent investigations have expanded its potential beyond cancer to immune-mediated disorders, including autoimmune diseases such as multiple sclerosis and systemic lupus erythematosus, as well as chronic viral infections including HIV and hepatitis B. This review examines the mechanistic foundations of CAR-T cells, advances in universal and allogeneic engineering strategies designed to mitigate graft-versus-host disease and host rejection, and emerging in vivo gene-delivery platforms that aim to bypass conventional ex vivo manufacturing. We further evaluate safety-control architectures, including logic-gated and inducible systems, and discuss translati
articles.chinese_summary: 本文综述CAR-T细胞疗法在肿瘤治疗中的进展及其向自身免疫病和慢性病毒感染等领域的扩展应用。重点探讨了通用型CAR-T设计、体内基因递送平台及安全控制系统等创新技术，涉及基因治疗和新型药物开发的前沿方向。

articles.title: Biohacking the human gut microbiome for precision health and therapeutic innovation.
articles.summary: Biohacking, the self-directed application of biotechnology, digital tools, and lifestyle interventions, has rapidly converged with gut microbiome science to create adaptive, individualized, and minimally invasive precision-health paradigms. This narrative review integrates current evidence on diet-based modulation, microbial therapeutics (probiotics, prebiotics, postbiotics, and fecal microbiota transplantation), and synthetic-biology approaches (engineered strains and phage or synthetic consortia) within a multi-omics and continuous-phenotyping framework. Mechanistically, short-chain fatty acids (SCFAs), bile-acid derivatives, and tryptophan catabolites operate as endocrine-like mediators linking gut microbial ecology with host immunity, metabolism, and neuroendocrine signaling. Pathways
articles.chinese_summary: 本文综述了通过生物黑客技术调控肠道微生物组实现精准健康的策略，整合了饮食干预、微生物疗法（益生菌、菌群移植）及合成生物学方法（工程菌株），在多组学框架下探讨微生物代谢物对宿主免疫代谢的调控机制，为个体化治疗创新提供新范式。

articles.title: Advances in synthetic microbial consortia for improved production of biochemicals and biofuels.
articles.summary: Synthetic microbial consortia have been widely used for the production of biochemicals and biofuels. By distributing biosynthetic tasks across multiple strains, it is possible to mitigate metabolic burden, alleviate metabolic crosstalk, and expand substrate and pathway flexibility. To obtain stable microbial consortia, it is crucial to rationally design and control community composition. Here, we review recent advancements in engineering synthetic microbial consortia for biotechnological applications. We also describe the approaches to maintain the stability of synthetic microbial consortia and regulate the populations, highlighting the importance of population control. The future perspective for constructing robust microbial consortia for sustainable biomanufacturing is also discussed.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文综述了合成微生物群落技术在生物化学品和生物燃料生产中的最新进展。重点探讨了通过合理设计群落结构和控制种群稳定性来提高生产效率的方法，为可持续生物制造提供了重要技术支撑。

articles.title: Delivery of Engineered BMP2 circRNA via Biomimetic Nanovesicles Enhances Titanium Implant Osseointegration Through Translation-Controlled Osteogenesis.
articles.summary: Although mRNA therapy has achieved favorable outcomes, it still faces limitations such as poor stability and short duration of protein expression. In this study, we utilized a covalently closed circular RNA encoding bone morphogenetic protein-2 (BMP2 circRNA), which exhibits exceptional nuclease resistance and an extended half-life, thereby enabling sustained and efficient BMP2 protein expression. The BMP2 circRNA was encapsulated into biomimetic nanovesicles (BNVs) derived from bone marrow mesenchymal stem cells (BMSCs) using co-extrusion technology. These BNVs were then anchored onto the surface of micro-arc oxidized titanium (Ti-MAO) implants via polydopamine (PDA) adhesion, constructing a novel local gene delivery system. In vitro experiments confirmed that this system is not only effi
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了一种基于环状RNA编码BMP2的新型基因递送系统，通过仿生纳米囊泡封装并固定在钛植入体表面。该系统克服了传统mRNA稳定性差的问题，实现持续高效的蛋白表达，显著增强骨整合效果，在创新药物递送和骨再生治疗领域具有重要价值。

articles.title: First Case of TAP1 Deficiency with EBV B-Cell Lymphoma Treated with Cellular Immunotherapy.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究报道首例TAP1缺陷伴EBV B细胞淋巴瘤患者接受细胞免疫治疗的案例。TAP1缺陷是一种罕见原发性免疫缺陷，该病例通过创新性细胞免疫疗法成功治疗EBV相关淋巴瘤，展示了新型免疫疗法在罕见遗传病并发症治疗中的临床应用价值。

articles.title: Redesigning CAR therapy to tackle immune effector cell-associated hematotoxicity.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文聚焦CAR疗法重新设计以解决免疫效应细胞相关血液毒性问题。通过优化治疗策略，直接关联创新药领域中CAR-T技术的安全性与有效性提升，对下一代细胞疗法的临床转化具有重要价值。

articles.title: CAR-T therapy: Trailblazing CAR(ing) in cancer treatment.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文聚焦CAR-T疗法在癌症治疗领域的突破性进展。作为创新免疫治疗的代表，CAR-T通过基因工程改造T细胞特异性靶向肿瘤，在血液肿瘤治疗中取得显著成效，属于生物医药前沿创新疗法的重要方向。

articles.title: Enhanced Intracellular Stability and Translation Efficiency of mRNA Drugs by a 2-arm mRNA Platform.
articles.summary: The poly(A) tail deadenylation and transient protein expression of messenger RNA (mRNA) extremely hinder its therapeutic potential in genetic diseases, from which it follows that improving RNA stability and translation efficiency has emerged as a critical priority. In this study, we construct a 2-arm mRNA via a streamlined modular assembly approach, characterized by a unique topology formed through the dimerization of two mRNA 3' poly(A) tails. This distinctive architecture exhibits the capacity for efficiently recruiting poly(A)-binding proteins (PABPs) to activate the eIF3-eIF4F complex and promote highly efficient cap-dependent translation, markedly improving 3' tail stability and resistance to nuclease degradation, with an intracellular half-life of up to 65 h. Furthermore, the 2-arm m
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了一种通过3'端poly(A)尾二聚化形成的双臂mRNA平台，能高效招募PABP蛋白并激活翻译起始复合物，显著提升mRNA的细胞内稳定性（半衰期达65小时）和翻译效率，为mRNA药物治疗遗传疾病提供了创新技术路径。

articles.title: Nano-Enabled Systemic Delivery of STING Agonist by Engineered Silicasome for Potent Antitumor Immunotherapy.
articles.summary: Activation of the STING pathway represents a potent strategy for cancer immunotherapy. However, the instability and systemic toxicity of STING agonists, especially cyclic dinucleotides (CDNs), limit their use via local administration with poor efficacy against metastatic or inaccessible tumors. Here, we develop an engineered silicasome nanocarrier for systemic delivery of the CDN ADU-S100 (ADU-Sili). Comprising ADU-S100-loaded mesoporous silica nanoparticles (MSNPs) coated with lipid bilayer, ADU-Sili markedly enhanced tumor accumulation and antitumor efficacy compared with free ADU-S100 and conventional liposomes in vivo. The advantage of systemic delivery was further demonstrated in bilateral tumors: ADU-Sili induced systemic antitumor immunity, suppressing both tumors, whereas free ADU-
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了一种工程化硅质体纳米载体，用于STING激动剂的系统性递送，解决了现有疗法的不稳定性和全身毒性问题。该纳米颗粒显著增强肿瘤积累和抗肿瘤疗效，在双侧肿瘤模型中成功诱导系统性抗肿瘤免疫，为转移性肿瘤的免疫治疗提供了创新解决方案。

articles.title: Mechanism of uptake and toxicity of a BCMA antibody drug conjugate with a MMAF payload by nonantigen expressing cells.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究探讨了BCMA靶向抗体药物偶联物（含MMAF载荷）在非抗原表达细胞中的摄取机制和毒性作用。揭示了ADC药物的脱靶毒性机制，对优化ADC药物设计、提高治疗安全性具有重要创新价值。

articles.title: Potential of CAR-T cell immunotherapy in rheumatoid arthritis.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨CAR-T细胞免疫疗法在类风湿关节炎中的应用潜力。作为创新药领域的前沿技术，CAR-T有望为自身免疫疾病提供突破性治疗方案，具有重要的临床转化价值。

articles.title: Humanized Synthetic Nanobody Library for Antivenom Development.
articles.summary: Humanized synthetic nanobodies are increasingly important in biomedical research and therapeutic antibody development owing to their high specificity, small size, superior tissue penetration, and reduced immunogenicity. In this study, we constructed a humanized synthetic nanobody library by combining eight sub-libraries. Each sub-library comprised four framework regions derived from human immunoglobulin framework sequences, whereas the complementarity-determining regions (CDRs) were designed based on camelid nanobody sequences. The resulting combined library reached a titer of 1.8 × 108 CFU/mL, with approximately 80% of clones containing correct inserts. To evaluate the functionality of the library, a synthetic 15-mer peptide mimic (Asp49-41) corresponding to an enzymatic region of As
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究构建了人源化合成纳米抗体库用于抗蛇毒血清开发。该库结合了8个子库，采用人类免疫球蛋白框架和骆驼纳米抗体CDR区，库容量达1.8×10^8 CFU/mL。通过筛选针对蛇毒酶活性区的模拟肽，验证了该库在治疗性抗体开发中的应用潜力。
articles.journal: Toxicon : official journal of the International Society on Toxinology

articles.title: Phage endolysins as alternative antimicrobials: mechanisms, clinical progress, and emerging resistance frameworks.
articles.summary: Phage endolysins are increasingly recognized as alternatives to antibiotics for mitigating the growing threat of antimicrobial resistance. Since their initial identification in the 1950s, phage endolysins have been extensively demonstrated to effectively combat bacterial infections in animal models and human patients. Although phage endolysins have completed Phase II and III clinical trials, potential obstacles and challenges associated with their large-scale use remain largely undefined. This review examines the potential of phage endolysins and the challenges they face in addressing infections caused by antibiotic-resistant bacteria in the future. We conducted a comprehensive overview of the historical development, bactericidal mechanisms, clinical progress, and resistance of phage endol
articles.chinese_summary: 噬菌体内溶素作为抗生素替代品，通过裂解细菌细胞壁机制对抗耐药菌感染。文章综述其历史发展、杀菌机制、临床进展及耐药性框架，已完成II/III期临床试验，但大规模应用仍面临挑战。

articles.title: Advancements and challenges of nanorobots in surgical medicine: design, applications, and interdisciplinary integration.
articles.summary: Surgical nanorobotics offers a strategy to surpass the physical constraints of conventional minimally invasive procedures. Designed to intervene at the cellular scale, these micro-agents facilitate high-precision tasks ranging from tumor margin delineation to targeted tissue manipulation. This article critically evaluates current actuation modalities-spanning magnetic, acoustic, optical, and chemical methods-for their efficacy in navigating complex physiological fluids. We specifically analyze the integration of propulsion systems with medical imaging, which is decisive for achieving the real-time feedback necessary for clinical safety in oncology and ophthalmology. Despite technical progress, widespread adoption faces persistent hurdles regarding long-term biocompatibility, deep-tissue co
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨了手术纳米机器人在细胞尺度实现高精度干预的技术进展，重点分析了磁控、声学等驱动方式与医学影像的整合。虽然该技术在肿瘤边界标定等精准医疗领域具有创新潜力，但面临长期生物相容性等临床转化挑战，与创新药领域的靶向治疗技术高度相关。

articles.title: Single-Cell and Spatial Omics: Methods and Applications.
articles.summary: Single-cell and spatial omics have revolutionized biomedical research by enabling high-resolution molecular profiling across cells and tissues, thereby overcoming key limitations of bulk sequencing and revealing unprecedented cellular heterogeneity and spatial organization central to development, homeostasis, and disease. Specifically, advances in high-throughput, subcellular, and multiomics profiling are promoting the field toward deeper insights. In parallel, computational progress, including generative artificial intelligence (AI) and foundation models, is developing rapidly for manipulating multimodal multiomics data. These advancements have been applied to diverse diseases and biological systems, facilitating innovative biomedical findings. However, a significant gap persists between
articles.chinese_summary: 单细胞与空间组学技术通过实现细胞和组织的高分辨率分子分析，克服传统测序局限，揭示发育、稳态及疾病中的细胞异质性和空间结构。高通量、亚细胞及多组学技术的进步与生成式AI等计算方法共同推动生物医学创新发现。

articles.title: A perspective on precision therapeutics in polycystic ovary syndrome: integrating multi-omics, AI-driven stratification, and emerging biologics.
articles.summary: Polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS) is one of the most prevalent and heterogeneous disorders in reproductive endocrinology, contributing to substantial reproductive, metabolic, and psychological morbidity. Despite major advances in genomics, neuroendocrinology, and systems biology, translation into disease-modifying therapies remains limited. This Perspective argues for a strategic shift toward precision medicine, supported by molecular subtyping, multi-omics profiling, and artificial intelligence (AI). These tools now enable biologically informed patient stratification and the identification of novel therapeutic targets. We highlight emerging strategies - including anti-Müllerian hormone (AMH) neutralization, neuroendocrine modulators, metabolic agents, and next-generation biologics - a
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨多囊卵巢综合征的精准治疗策略，整合多组学分析和人工智能分层方法，重点关注抗苗勒氏激素中和剂、神经内分泌调节剂及新一代生物制剂等创新疗法，与创新药领域高度相关。

articles.title: Causal Prediction of TP53 Variant Pathogenicity Using a Perturbation-Informed Protein Language Model.
articles.summary: Accurate prediction of variant functional impact is crucial for understanding human diseases, particularly for cancer-related genes such as TP53. Advances in high-throughput mutational assays have enhanced variant effect prediction (VEP), but missense classification remains challenging due to the limitations of broad, non-gene-specific models. Here we present CaVepP53, a TP53-specific predictor fine-tuned on perturbation-based experimental variants. The model not only classifies mutations but also quantifies their pathogenicity by calculating Euclidean distances between the wild-type and mutant embeddings and deriving confidence scores through logistic transformation. Benchmarking demonstrates that CaVepP53 significantly outperforms general-purpose models, such as AlphaMissense (AM) and Pr
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了TP53特异性变异效应预测模型CaVepP53，通过扰动实验数据微调蛋白质语言模型，显著提升错义突变致病性分类准确性。该技术对癌症精准医疗具有重要价值，为基因治疗靶点筛选和临床诊断提供新工具。

articles.title: Cadonilimab Plus Lenvatinib Combined with Stereotactic Body Radiotherapy for Conversion Therapy in Unresectable or Potentially Resectable Hepatocellular Carcinoma: A Study Protocol.
articles.summary: Conversion therapy offers a critical opportunity to convert potentially resectable hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) to surgically resectable status; yet, its optimal protocol and efficacy remain unstandardized and controversial. As a first-line systemic treatment for advanced HCC, immunotherapy combined with targeted therapy has demonstrated robust antitumor activity. Accumulating evidence suggests that radiotherapy can render some unresectable HCC patients amenable to surgical resections. Given these advancements, this study aims to investigate the efficacy and safety of cadonilimab (a dual immune checkpoint inhibitor targeting PD-1 and CTLA-4) plus lenvatinib (a multi-targeted tyrosine kinase inhibitor) combined with stereotactic body radiotherapy (SBRT), with the goal of achievi
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究评估卡度尼利单抗（PD-1/CTLA-4双抗）联合仑伐替尼及立体定向放疗用于不可切除肝细胞癌转化治疗的疗效与安全性。该方案结合创新免疫疗法与靶向药物，旨在通过协同作用提升肿瘤切除率，属于肿瘤治疗领域的创新性临床探索。

articles.title: Recent progress of dendritic cell-derived exosomes in tumor immunotherapy.
articles.summary: Despite advancements in conventional tumor therapies including surgery and chemotherapy, effective cancer management remains challenging due to treatment resistance and tumor microenvironment complexity. Dendritic cell (DC)-based vaccines, while representing a milestone in tumor immunotherapy, face clinical limitations such as poor viability and limited antigen presentation capacity. Importantly, dendritic cell-derived exosomes (DEXs) have emerged as a potential alternative. In contrast to DC vaccines, DEXs possess excellent in vivo biocompatibility and biosafety, demonstrate higher immunogenicity, exhibit stronger immunosuppressive resistance, and require lower production costs. Mechanistically, DEXs overcome immunosuppressive obstacles through dual delivery of immunostimulatory cargo and
articles.chinese_summary: 本文综述树突状细胞来源外泌体(DEXs)在肿瘤免疫治疗中的最新进展。相比传统DC疫苗，DEXs具有更好的生物相容性、免疫原性和抗免疫抑制能力，且生产成本更低。通过双重递送免疫刺激因子和抗原，DEXs可克服肿瘤微环境中的免疫抑制障碍，为创新肿瘤免疫疗法提供新方向。

articles.title: Targeting ANXA1/TRKA axis enhances immunotherapy sensitivity in neural invasion-positive gastric cancer.
articles.summary: Gastric cancer (GC) remains a leading cause of cancer-related morbidity and mortality worldwide. Neural invasion (NI) is a common pathological behavior that worsens the prognosis in GC. However, the immune microenvironment of neural invasion-positive GC (NI+GC) and its potential therapeutic implications remain poorly defined. Here, we performed single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) on tumor specimens from patients with NI+GC and neural invasion-negative GC (NI-GC) to comprehensively delineate the immune landscape. Our analysis revealed a significant enrichment of exhausted ANXA1+CD8+T cells within NI+GC tissues, which was validated by flow cytometry and multiplex immunohistochemistry assays. Clinically, patients with greater infiltration of ANXA1+CD8+ T cells had worse overall survival an
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过单细胞RNA测序分析神经侵犯阳性胃癌的免疫微环境，发现耗竭性ANXA1+CD8+T细胞显著富集且与不良预后相关。研究揭示了ANXA1/TRKA轴可作为增强免疫治疗敏感性的潜在靶点，为开发新型癌症免疫疗法提供了重要线索。

articles.title: Efficacy and safety of PD-1/ PD-L1 inhibitors as adjuvants in the treatment of patients with solid cancers: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.
articles.summary: Copyright: &copy; 2026 Aleid et al. This is an open access article distributed under the terms of the Creative Commons Attribution License (CC BY 4.0), which permits unrestricted use, distribution, and reproduction in any medium, provided the original author and source are credited. Programmed cell death protein-1 (PD-1) and programmed death ligand-1 (PD-L1) inhibitors are widely used in cancer treatment. Their benefit as adjuvant therapy in solid tumors is still being defined. This systematic review and meta-analysis evaluated the efficacy and safety of PD-1 and PD-L1 inhibitors as adjuvant treatment in patients with solid tumors. We conducted a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials in accordance with PRISMA recommendations and PROSPERO registration CRD42
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过系统评价和荟萃分析评估PD-1/PD-L1抑制剂作为辅助疗法治疗实体瘤的疗效与安全性。结果显示这类免疫检查点抑制剂能显著改善患者预后，属于肿瘤免疫治疗领域的重要创新药物，但与生物制造和大健康领域直接关联较弱。

articles.title: Loss of Tumor-Infiltrating Lymphocytes and Poor Response to Immunotherapy in IDH GOF Mutant Melanoma.
articles.summary: Recent innovations in melanoma treatment with immune checkpoint blockade (ICB) have improved overall outcomes for patients, however over 50% of patients still develop resistance to treatment. These patients either have intrinsic resistance, and never respond to therapy, or develop acquired resistance months or years into treatment. The mechanisms underlying ICB resistance remain poorly understood. Our data shows that isocitrate dehydrogenase gain of function (IDH GOF) mutant melanoma patients have a worse response to anti-PD1 immunotherapy. IDH mutations have been found to be oncogenic and associated with differential methylation in multiple cancers but are not yet characterized in human melanoma. Here, we investigate the clinical, immune, and transcriptional phenotypes of IDH GOF melanoma
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示IDH功能获得性突变导致黑色素瘤对PD-1免疫治疗反应不佳的机制。通过分析临床特征和肿瘤微环境，发现突变体肿瘤中淋巴细胞浸润减少，为克服免疫治疗耐药性提供了新靶点，属于创新药研发领域的重要进展。

articles.title: Single-electrode, voltage-switching biosensing of glucose and ethanol enabled by a dual-functional single-atom nanozyme.
articles.summary: Real-time and full concentration monitoring of substrates and products in microbial fermentation remains a fundamental challenge due to complex matrix interference and signal crosstalk. Herein, we report Fe-N-C single-atom site catalyst nanowires (Fe-SASC/NWs) with atomically dispersed Fe-Nx sites exhibiting dual electrocatalytic specificity for H2O2 reduction at +0.05 V and NADH oxidation at +0.2 V with detection limits of 0.2 μM and 0.1 μM by voltage-switching electrocatalysis, respectively. By co-immobilizing glucose oxidase and alcohol dehydrogenase on Fe-SASC/NWs, a single-electrode biosensor achieves interference-free simultaneous detection of glucose (5-30 mM) and ethanol (5-60 mM) via voltage-switching chronoamperometry with corresponding d
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了一种基于单原子纳米酶的双功能生物传感器，通过电压切换电催化技术实现了葡萄糖和乙醇的无干扰同步检测。该技术解决了微生物发酵过程中基质干扰和信号串扰的难题，为生物制造过程的实时浓度监测提供了创新解决方案。

articles.title: Engineering Corynebacterium glutamicum as a multifunctional biofactory for living therapeutic materials and controlled ectoine delivery.
articles.summary: Living therapeutic materials (LTMs) are an emerging class of biomaterials that integrate living cells within engineered polymer matrices to provide dynamic and responsive functionalities. In this study, we engineered the robust, nonpathogenic, and GRAS-certified microorganism Corynebacterium glutamicum into a multifunctional biofactory for LTM applications. Using synthetic biology, we designed and constructed C. glutamicum strains capable of sensing, reporting, and producing the extremolyte ectoine. Ectoine is a clinically used compatible solute with cytoprotective and anti-inflammatory properties that is widely applied in dermatological formulations, nasal sprays, and ophthalmic preparations for the treatment of inflammatory and stress-related conditions. The engineered strains were furth
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究将谷氨酸棒杆菌改造为多功能生物工厂，用于生产活性治疗材料并控制性释放依克多因。通过合成生物学技术构建的工程菌株具备感知、报告和生产极端溶质依克多因的能力，这种物质具有细胞保护和抗炎特性，广泛应用于皮肤病制剂、鼻腔喷雾剂和眼科制剂。

articles.title: Synthetic biology development of microbial strains for liquid biofuel production.
articles.summary: As a renewable energy source, biofuels can reduce dependence on fossil fuels and effectively lower greenhouse gas emissions, mitigating the global climate change issue. The production of liquid biofuels primarily relies on the biosynthetic processes of microorganisms. While many natural strains possess specific metabolic capabilities to produce liquid biofuels, their performance often fails to meet the demands of industrial-scale production. Therefore, genetic engineering to construct strains with optimized metabolic pathways has become an inevitable approach. Synthetic biology technology has advanced rapidly in recent years, giving rise to a large number of new tools and methods that significantly accelerate the development of strain-engineering, thereby enhancing the yield and productivi
articles.chinese_summary: 本文通过合成生物学技术改造微生物代谢途径，优化液态生物燃料生产工艺。重点涉及菌株工程开发与生物合成过程强化，与生物制造领域的合成生物学工具开发、工业菌株构建及生物加工过程高度相关，属于可再生能源的生物制造应用。

articles.title: Synthetic super-enhancers enable precision viral immunotherapy.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发合成超级增强子技术，用于精准病毒免疫治疗。通过合成生物学方法增强治疗性病毒的靶向性和效力，属于创新基因治疗领域，与精准医疗高度相关，对新型疗法开发具有重要价值。

articles.title: Targeting HAS2 to enhance anti-tumor immunity in pancreatic cancer via PD-L1 regulation.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过靶向HAS2调控PD-L1表达来增强胰腺癌抗肿瘤免疫。该机制涉及肿瘤微环境重塑，与创新药开发高度相关，为免疫治疗提供了新靶点策略。

articles.title: Recurrent Genomic Alterations in BCRi-Experienced CLL Patients Treated With Venetoclax: Extended Phase 2 Follow-Up.
